title: Glass Mason Jars with Lids - Set of 6 250ml Air Tight Jars for Overnight Oats, Homemade Jam - Sturdy Glass Jar with Lid for Honey, Pickling, Preserving, Food Storage (250ml)
features: SET OF 6 MASON JARS WITH LIDS - Small mason jars with lids are an essential home organisation tool and kitchen accessory. It’s always a good idea to stock up with a 6-pack of high quality 250ml glass jars with lids. Dimensions: 8 cm (H) x 7.5cm (W).

AIRTIGHT SEAL - In contrast to other glass storage containers, these food-grade jam jars with lids deliver an airtight and watertight seal. You need a sturdy airtight seal for lasting freshness if you wish to store food or beverages.

REUSABLE PRESERVING JARS - Once you purchase this set of six preserve jars, you won’t have to continuously reinvest as they are reusable. These preserving jars are made of solid, clear glass with durable, silver metal lids.

VERSATILE FOOD STORAGE - These dishwasher safe, 100% BPA-free air tight jars for overnight oats are easy to clean and fantastic for storing food! You can use these glass mason jars with lids for overnight oats, homemade jams, meal prep, pickles, chutneys and more.

PERFECT FOR HOBBIES - Start a small crafting business or find a new favourite hobby with these premium glass jars for candle making! They’re also perfect for lotions, honey, skincare and wedding gifts.
description: Product Description Versatile Jars There are multiple things you can store in this 6 pack of Mason Jars! Not only food, but also lotions, honey, skincare, candle making, wedding gifts, and shower favours. Perfect for Food and Beverages These 100% BPA-free air tight jars are easy to clean and fantastic for storing food! You can use these large glass jars for homemade jams, meal prep, pickles, chutneys, baby food storage and more. Practical Addition to your Household Mason jars are an essential home organisation tool and kitchen accessory. The fact they are reusable and dishwasher safe means you won’t have to continuously reinvest, as these Mason Jars are here to stay! HEFTMAN Glass Mason Jars With Lids (250ml) - 6 Pack Collect, store, and preserve your favourite foods in these classic, reusable small jam jars with lids 250ml. Featuring a durable silver screw top lid with an airtight seal to prevent food spoilage, this 6-piece 250ml glass jar with lid set is ideal for meal prep, pickling, chutneys, and more. These overnight oats jars with lids are also dishwasher safe (without the lids) for easy cleaning. Jars with lid dimensions : 8 cm (H) x 7.5 cm (W).
